mission

Coney Island Ballpark

An Episode 3 main mission to rescue virologist Vitaly Tchernenko from Black Tusk captivity at Coney Island.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Rescue operation

The ballpark objective connects Episode 3 directly to the antiviral storyline: Agents establish a foothold, locate Tchernenko and attempt to remove him from Black Tusk custody. [1][2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Coney Island Ballpark is one of the two main missions introduced with Episode 3. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Black Tusk holds Vitaly Tchernenko at the ballpark, and the Division mission is to rescue him. [1][2]

  3. confirmed

    Tchernenko is considered important to efforts to mass-produce a broad-spectrum antiviral against Green Poison. [1][2]

Sources

  1. [1] Episode 3: Coney Island Live Now! — Ubisoft (2020-02-12). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Dialogue and objective-by-objective transcription remain pending direct capture.
